faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Financial Management App
faq.subtitle: Get answers about Lumyf.
faq.a0: Lumyf is personal and shared financial management software. With it you record income and expenses, track investments, set financial goals and control spending — all in one place, synced in real time, for you and your family.
faq.a1: There is no free usage. To use the app you must subscribe to the Pro plan. You have {trialDays} free trial days and after that period, Stripe charges automatically. Cancel anytime.
faq.a1b: Lumyf is for couples and families who want to organize their finances in one place — and can also be used individually. Ideal for those who want to share financial control with the people who matter (or manage on their own), set goals and track income, expenses and investments with clarity and transparency.
faq.a2: Each family creates a workspace and invites members by email. Everyone can record transactions, view reports and track goals. Information is synced in real time for all members.
faq.q3: Does Lumyf connect to my bank?
faq.a3: No. Lumyf has no connection, integration or link to your bank account. All transactions are entered manually by you and your family. We do not access, connect or import data from financial institutions.
faq.a4: Yes. We use encryption and secure authentication. Your financial data is protected and only people you invite will have access to the workspace.
faq.a5: Payment is processed via Stripe (card). After the {trialDays} free trial days, billing is automatic. You can cancel your subscription at any time in the settings panel.
faq.q6: How many people can use a workspace?
faq.a6: The Pro plan allows up to 3 members per workspace.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: Adjust theme, font size, contrast and animations. Preferences are saved in your browser and apply across the site.

s1.title: 1. Data Controller
s1.body: Lumyf acts as the controller of personal data you provide when using the platform. We process your data in compliance with LGPD and GDPR where applicable.

s2.title: 2. Data We Collect
s2.item1: Authentication: email, name, profile photo (if provided via OAuth).
s2.item2: Operations: transactions, categories, goals, budgets and financial data you register.
s2.item3: Location: optional, only with explicit consent, to improve experience (timezone and regional context).
s2.item4: Payments: billing data processed by Stripe (see Stripe policy).

s3.title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis
s3.body: We use your data to provide the service, process payments, provide support and comply with legal obligations. Legal bases include contract performance, consent and legitimate interest.

s4.title: 4. Sharing
s4.body: Your data is tied to the workspace and shared only with members you invite. We use Supabase (database) and Stripe (payments) as processors.

s5.title: 5. Security
s5.body: We apply encryption, secure authentication and access controls. Financial data is protected by provider security policies and engineering best practices.

s6.title: 6. Your Rights (LGPD / GDPR)
s6.body: To exercise your rights, use in-app settings or contact support by email. EU/EEA users may lodge a complaint with their competent data protection authority.
s6.right3: Request deletion of your personal data.

s7.title: 7. Retention
s7.body: We keep your data while your account is active. After account deletion, we remove personal data within up to 30 days, except where legal retention is required.

s8.title: 8. International Transfers
s8.body: Data may be processed on servers outside your country. We apply appropriate safeguards when required.

s9.title: 9. Cookies and Technologies
s9.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and app functionality. We do not use marketing cookies without your explicit consent.

s10.title: 10. Changes
s10.body: Policy updates will be published on this page with a new date. Relevant changes will be communicated by email or in the app.

s11.title: 11. Contact
s11.body: For privacy questions or rights requests, contact us through the support email listed in the app.

s1.title: 1. Trial Period
s1.body: We offer a {trialDays}-day free trial for paid plans. During this period, you will not be charged. If you cancel before the trial ends, there will be no charge.

s2.title: 2. Refund Eligibility
s2.body: Within 7 calendar days after the first subscription charge, you can request a full refund according to applicable consumer laws.

s3.title: 3. How to Request
s3.body: Contact support through the email listed in the app, informing your account email and reason for the request. Refunds are processed within up to 10 business days to the original payment method.

s4.title: 4. Subscription Cancellation
s4.body: You can cancel at any time through the Stripe Customer Portal. Access remains active until the end of the already-paid period. There is no prorated refund after the initial 7-day period.

s5.title: 5. Exceptions
s5.body: In cases of billing errors, duplicate charges or severe service failures, we may evaluate refunds outside the standard period.

s6.title: 6. Processing
s6.body: Payments are processed by Stripe. Refunds may appear on your statement within a few days, depending on your financial institution.

s7.title: 7. Contact
s7.body: Questions about refunds: contact us through the support email listed in the app.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: Lumyf is a collaborative financial management SaaS. By using the platform, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the service.

s2.title: 2. Service Description
s2.body: We provide tools to track income, expenses, financial goals, investments and reports in a collaborative workspace environment.

s3.title: 3. User Responsibilities
s3.item1: Provide accurate information and keep data updated.
s3.item3: Control and review who has access to your workspace.
s3.item4: Use the service lawfully and responsibly.

s4.title: 4. Plans and Billing
s4.bodyBeforeLink: Paid plans are billed through Stripe. By subscribing, you agree to billing and renewal terms. See our

s5.title: 5. Changes
s5.body: The service may evolve with new features, limits and plans. Relevant changes will be communicated through official channels. Continued use after changes means acceptance of the updated terms.

s6.title: 6. Termination
s6.body: You may close your account at any time in settings. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

s7.title: 7. Disclaimer of Warranties
s7.body: The service is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or error-free operation. We recommend keeping copies of your data in external systems.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.body: Questions about these terms: contact us through the support email listed in the app.
